ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funding_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding goal (e.g., Less Than 1000) */,
  "min_amount" INTEGER /* Minimum amount for the funding goal */,
  "max_amount" INTEGER /* Maximum amount for the funding goal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the funding goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the project status (e.g., Successful, Failed, Canceled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the project outcome (e.g., Successful, Failed, Canceled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding goal category */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project status */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project outcome */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES funding_goals ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES project_outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES project_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "success_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each success rate */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding goal category */,
  "successful" INTEGER /* Number of successful projects */,
  "failed" INTEGER /* Number of failed projects */,
  "canceled" INTEGER /* Number of canceled projects */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of projects */,
  "success_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful projects */,
  "failure_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of failed projects */,
  "cancellation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of canceled projects */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the success rates were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_success_rates_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES funding_goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the project (e.g., team lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* Binary file containing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
